title: Pita Fry Tofu Delight
description: A sweet and fluffy Vietnamese dish featuring pita bread fried with high-protein tofu, perfect for meal prepping.
instructions: Crush the garlic and ginger with a mortar and pestle or use a blender.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, crushed garlic and ginger, sugar, and fish sauce. Set aside.
Slice pita bread into rounds. Place slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle each slice with vegetable oil and brush the oil around the edges to prevent burning.
Pour the marinade over the pita slices. Make sure they are evenly coated.
Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
Gently fry the tofu in a non-stick pan using remaining oil, adding a pinch of salt if desired. Fry for about 3-4 minutes each side.
Assemble by placing pita slices on plates and topping with fried tofu. Serve warm.
